expectations.text: Produces organized design documentation with clear sections or files for architecture, binding/build, safe API, testing/release, and async/protocol analysis when applicable.
Identifies libobmm's concrete API families: export/unexport, import/unimport, preimport/unpreimport, ownership, and query.
expectations.evidence: Lists export/unexport, import/unimport, preimport/unpreimport, ownership and query API families.

expectations.text: Accounts for mem_id as the resource handle and OBMM_INVALID_MEMID as the invalid/error sentinel.
expectations.evidence: Identifies typedef uint64_t mem_id and OBMM_INVALID_MEMID == 0.

expectations.text: Accounts for struct obmm_mem_desc and struct obmm_preimport_info using flexible array members with priv_len/priv allocation rules.
expectations.evidence: Covers obmm_mem_desc and obmm_preimport_info FAM priv[] handling.

expectations.text: Recommends a publishable obmm-sys plus obmm crate split, with any third async/protocol layer explicitly deferred or justified.
expectations.evidence: Chooses obmm-sys plus obmm and defers protocol/async layers.

expectations.text: Chooses a binding path and excludes at least one alternative path with a reason.
expectations.evidence: Chooses handwritten extern + ABI/layout checks and excludes build-time bindgen, wrapper.c and mummy.

expectations.text: Specifies build.rs/linking details including links = "obmm", system linking, env overrides, and docs.rs or CI fallback behavior.
expectations.evidence: Includes links = "obmm", dynamic system linking, env overrides and docs.rs/CI fallback.

expectations.text: Defines safe API ownership boundaries with RAII guards for export/import/preimport lifecycles and Result/Error mapping.
expectations.evidence: Defines RAII owners for export/import/preimport and Result/Error mapping.

expectations.text: Defines Send/Sync policy conservatively for memory handles and ownership transitions.
expectations.evidence: Uses conservative Send/Sync policy for owners and mappings.

expectations.text: Includes ABI/regeneration/smoke testing and release checks including license and semver.
expectations.evidence: Includes ABI/layout, binding diff, CI/smoke, license and semver/release coverage.

expectations.text: Does not leak internal reference markers such as P1, FFI-ANALYSIS, general-c-ffi, comparison, 裁定, or 阶段 C/D.
expectations.evidence: No forbidden internal reference marker appears in the design output.

uncertainties: Timing/token metrics were not available from subagent notifications in this environment.
